Learn More 
Sept. 29, 2023 
Vaccine Recommendations 
Before you become pregnant, learn how to protect yourself and your child from serious diseases. 
Sept. 29, 2023 
Vaccines for Family and Caregivers 
Family and caregivers should be up to date on vaccinations to protect the baby 
Nov. 9, 2021 
Vaccine Safety for Moms-To-Be 
Vaccines help protect pregnant women and babies against serious diseases. 
Jan. 30, 2025 
Pregnancy & Vaccines 
Getting recommended vaccines before or while you are pregnant helps protect both you and your baby from potentially serious diseases.
